name: radif_reg_to_i2c_master
description: Software-visible register map for the RADIF register-controlled I2C master.

regions.name: radif_reg_to_i2c_master
regions.description: Controls one-byte I2C read/write transactions and SCL timing.

registers.name: control
registers.description: Control register used to launch and clear I2C transactions.

fields.name: START
fields.description: Starts a one-byte I2C transaction when the master is idle.

fields.name: CLEAR
fields.description: Clears sticky done and error status.

fields.name: READ
fields.description: Selects read transaction when set, write transaction when clear.

fields.name: BUSY
fields.description: Master is actively driving an I2C transaction.

fields.name: ACK_ERR
fields.description: Slave did not acknowledge the address or write data byte.

registers.name: clk_div
registers.description: SCL half-period divider. SCL phase changes every clk_div + 1 FPGA clock cycles.

registers.name: slave_addr
registers.description: 7-bit I2C slave address used for the next transaction.

registers.name: tx_data
registers.description: Write data byte used for write transactions.

registers.name: rx_data
registers.description: Read data byte captured from the last read transaction.
